## Current Production Stack

The current production backend was migrated on April 8, 2026 to `Brazil South`.
The previous West US 3 resources were removed and only appear in Cost Management as early-April legacy charges.

### Core Backend

| Resource Group | Service | Name | Location | SKU / Plan | Current State | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `travelbox-peru-bs-rg` | App Service Plan | `travelbox-peru-plan-linux-bs` | Brazil South | `B2 Linux` | Running | 1 worker, max 3 workers |
| `travelbox-peru-bs-rg` | App Service | `travelbox-backend-bs` | Brazil South | Attached to `B2` plan | Running | `JAVA|21-java21`, `httpsOnly=true`, domain `api.inkavoy.pe` |
| `travelbox-peru-bs-rg` | PostgreSQL Flexible Server | `travelbox-peru-db-bs` | Brazil South | `Standard_B1ms` | Ready | PostgreSQL 16, 32 GB allocated storage, 7-day backups |
| `travelbox-peru-bs-rg` | Application Insights | `travelbox-appinsights-bs` | Brazil South | Pay-as-you-go | Succeeded | Retention 90 days, workspace-based |
| `ai_travelbox-appinsights-bs_a3afbd61-8f6d-4797-a17e-586d95dfacab_managed` | Log Analytics Workspace | `managed-travelbox-appinsights-bs-ws` | Brazil South | `PerGB2018` | Succeeded | Retention 30 days |
| `travelbox_kv_bs` | Key Vault | `kvtravelboxpebs` | Brazil South | `standard` | Succeeded | RBAC enabled, purge protection enabled |
| `travelbox_st_bs` | Storage Account | `travelboximgbs01` | Brazil South | `StorageV2 / Standard_RAGRS` | Succeeded | Images and media blobs |
| `travelbox_st_bs` | Storage Account | `travelboxrepbs01` | Brazil South | `StorageV2 / Standard_RAGRS` | Succeeded | Reports and generated files |
| `travelbox-peru-bs-rg` | Managed Certificate | `api-inkavoy-pe-bs` | Brazil South | Managed | Succeeded | TLS for `api.inkavoy.pe` |
